ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, closed, maintenance) */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the symbol is traded */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the stock symbol data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, disabled, pending verification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the analysis */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the analysis */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol related to the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., price fluctuation, merger, acquisition) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread, dismissed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the notification */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, data feed) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "access_key" TEXT /* Access key required to access the data source */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key required to access the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the data source was checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the feed is from */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "feed_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the feed is updated (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the data feed was updated */,
  "next_update" TEXT /* Next scheduled update time for the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the index is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market index */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market index (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the market index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the index component (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the index component data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* Currency being exchanged from */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* Currency being exchanged to */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange rate (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the exchange rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Pay date */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dividend (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the dividend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)
